subject: Delivery took 17 days on order NW-10034
resolution: Apologized for the delay, confirmed it was a UPS ground-transit exception rather than a lost package, and issued $15 store credit; customer accepted.

subject: Camp stove arrived with a cracked burner (NW-10058)
resolution: Confirmed defective item, issued a full refund, and shipped a free replacement unit with expedited shipping.

subject: Wrong boot size shipped on NW-10095
resolution: Verified the wrong item was shipped, sent a prepaid return label, and shipped the correct size at no additional charge.

subject: Question about restocking fee on a 3-week-old return
resolution: Explained the 15% restocking fee that applies to returns made 15-30 days after delivery per refund-policy.md; customer proceeded with the return.

subject: Requested cancellation of order NW-10126 before it shipped
resolution: Cancelled the order prior to fulfillment and confirmed no charge would be made to the customer's card.
